creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with modifications below.  Thanks! 

o "elisp" category is not "elisps". 
o Fix "Version required:" header correctly 
o Move *_DEPENDS lines into apropriate position. 
This can ease to find what ports are required. 
o Change MAINTAINER line from "?=" to "=". 
o Add NO_LATEST_LINK to flim-emacs20-current. 
o Use ${MV}, ${CAT} and ${ECHO} instead of mv, cat and echo. 
o Remove trailing whitespace in pkg/PLIST.
